results.title: If a gauge that a user has voted for gets removed, their voting power allocated for that gauge will be lost
results.reasoning: Yes. The audit explicitly reports the same issue (see items 3 and 11): in GaugeController.vote_for_gauge_weights, when a gauge is removed (gauge_types_[gauge] == 0), gauge_type = gauge_types_[_gauge] - 1 becomes -1 and the require(gauge_type >= 0) reverts, preventing users from voting 0 to reclaim their voting power. This is the same code path, root cause, and attack as the vulnerability description, and the same fix (removing/adjusting the gauge_type >= 0 check to allow zeroing on removed gauges) would resolve both.
